pixelCode.label: Pixel Code
pixelCode.description: Your TikTok Pixel ID. Please see TikTok's [Pixel documentation](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739583652957185) for information on how to find this value.

ldu.label: Limited Data Use
ldu.description: In order to help facilitate advertiser's compliance with the right to opt-out of sale and sharing of personal data under certain U.S. state privacy laws, TikTok offers a Limited Data Use ("LDU") feature. For more information, please refer to TikTok's [documentation page](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1770092377990145).

autoPageView.label: Fire TikTok Pixel Pageview event on page load.
autoPageView.description: If true, TikTok Pixel will fire a "Pageview" event whenevent the pixel is loaded on the page.

useExistingPixel.label: [Deprecated] Use Existing Pixel
useExistingPixel.description: Deprecated. Please do not provide any value.

reportWebEvent.title: Report Web Event
reportWebEvent.description: Report events directly to TikTok. Data shared can power TikTok solutions like dynamic product ads, custom targeting, campaign optimization and attribution.

event_spec_type.label: Additional Fields
event_spec_type.description: Include fields for travel or vehicle events.

event.label: Event Name
event.description: Conversion event name. Please refer to the "Supported Web Events" section on in TikTok’s [Pixel SDK documentation](https://business-api.tiktok.com/portal/docs?id=1739585696931842) for accepted event names.

event_id.label: Event ID
event_id.description: Any hashed ID that can identify a unique user/session.

contents.label: Contents
contents.description: Related item details for the event.

brand.label: Brand
brand.description: Brand name of the product item.

content_ids.label: Content IDs
content_ids.description: Product IDs associated with the event, such as SKUs. Do not populate this field if the 'Contents' field is populated. This field accepts a single string value or an array of string values.

num_items.label: Number of Items
num_items.description: Number of items when checkout was initiated. Used with the InitiateCheckout event.

content_type.label: Content Type
content_type.description: Type of the product item. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as a `sku_id`, set this field to `product`. When the `content_id` in the `Contents` field is specified as an `item_group_id`, set this field to `product_group`.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency for the value specified as ISO 4217 code.

value.label: Value
value.description: Value of the order or items sold.

description.label: Description
description.description: A string description of the web event.

query.label: Query
query.description: The text string that was searched for.

search_string.label: Search String
search_string.description: The text string entered by the user for the search. Optionally used with the Search event.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: A single phone number in E.164 standard format. TikTok Pixel will hash this value before sending to TikTok. e.g. +14150000000. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

email.label: Email
email.description: A single email address. TikTok Pixel will be hash this value before sending to TikTok.

first_name.label: First Name
first_name.description: The first name of the customer. The name should be in lowercase without any punctuation. Special characters are allowed.

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The last name of the customer. The name should be in lowercase without any punctuation. Special characters are allowed.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: Uniquely identifies the user who triggered the conversion event. TikTok Pixel will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

postal_code.label: Postal Code
postal_code.description: Postal code for the vehicle location.

year.label: Year of the Vehicle
year.description: Year the vehicle was laucned in yyyy format.

mileage_value.label: Mileage Value
mileage_value.description: Vehicle mileage (in km or miles). Zero (0) for new vehicle.

mileage_unit.label: Mileage Unit
mileage_unit.description: Mileage unites in miles (MI) or kilometers (KM).

preferred_price_range_min.label: Minimum Preferred Price
preferred_price_range_min.description: Minimum preferred price of the vehicle.

preferred_price_range_max.label: Maximum Preferred Price
preferred_price_range_max.description: Maximum preferred price of the vehicle.

viewcontent_type.label: Soft Lead Landing Page
viewcontent_type.description: Optional for ViewContent. Use viewcontent_type to differentiate between soft lead landing pages.

search_type.label: Other Search Page
search_type.description: Optional for Search. Use search_type to differentiate other user searches (such as dealer lookup) from inventory search.

registration_type.label: Other Registration Page
registration_type.description: Optional for CompleteRegistration. Use registration_type to differentiate between different types of customer registration on websites.

suggested_hotels.label: Suggested Hotels
suggested_hotels.description: Suggested hotels. This can be a single string value or an array of string values.

departing_departure_date.label: Departure Date
departing_departure_date.description: Date of flight departure. Accepted date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD

returning_departure_date.label: Arrival Date
returning_departure_date.description: Date of return flight. Accepted date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD

destination_ids.label: Destination IDs
destination_ids.description: If a client has a destination catalog, the client can associate one or more destinations in the catalog with a specific flight event. For instance, link a particular route to a nearby museum and a nearby beach, both of which are destinations in the catalog. This field accepts a single string value or an array of string values.

departing_arrival_date.label: Departing Arrival Date
departing_arrival_date.description: The date and time for arrival at the destination of the outbound journey. Accepted date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD

returning_arrival_date.label: Returning Arrival Date
returning_arrival_date.description: The date and time when the return journey is completed. Accepted date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD

travel_class.label: Flight Ticket Class
travel_class.description: Class of the flight ticket, must be: "eco", "prem", "bus", "first".

user_score.label: User Score
user_score.description: Represents the relative value of this potential customer to advertiser.

preferred_num_stops.label: Preferred Number of Stops
preferred_num_stops.description: The preferred number of stops the user is looking for. 0 for direct flight.

travel_start.label: Start Date of the Trip
travel_start.description: The start date of user's trip. Accept date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD.

travel_end.label: End Date of the Trip
travel_end.description: The end date of user's trip. Accept date formats: YYYYMMDD, YYYY-MM-DD, YYYY-MM-DDThh:mmTZD, and YYYY-MM-DDThh:mm:ssTZD.

suggested_destinations.label: Suggested Destination IDs
suggested_destinations.description: A list of IDs representing destination suggestions for this user. This parameter is not applicable for the Search event. This field accepts a single string value or an array of string values.

identify.title: Identify
identify.description: Use a Segment identify() call to sent PII data to TikTok Pixel. Note that the PII information will be sent with the next track() call.

phone_number.label: Phone Number
phone_number.description: A single phone number in E.164 standard format. TikTok Pixel will hash this value before sending to TikTok. e.g. +14150000000. Segment will hash this value before sending to TikTok.

email.label: Email
email.description: A single email address. TikTok Pixel will be hash this value before sending to TikTok.

first_name.label: First Name
first_name.description: The first name of the customer. The name should be in lowercase without any punctuation. Special characters are allowed.

last_name.label: Last Name
last_name.description: The last name of the customer. The name should be in lowercase without any punctuation. Special characters are allowed.

external_id.label: External ID
external_id.description: Uniquely identifies the user who triggered the conversion event. TikTok Pixel will hash this value before sending to TikTok.
